meta.title: About — Free Open-Source Astro 7 Theme
meta.description: What Astro Rocket is and how it's built: a free, lightning-fast Astro 7 starter theme with 57 designed components, 12 colour themes, built-in i18n, and dark mode.

hero.description: A free, open-source Astro 7 starter theme to build anything on.

whatYouGet.heading: Everything a real website needs
whatYouGet.lead: The component library is the heart of the theme. Everything else a real website needs is already on board.

items.title: 57 designed components
items.description: From buttons to hero sections: typed, accessible, consistent, and documented in a live showcase.

items.title: Pages to start from
items.description: Home, about, services, contact, blog, projects, and 404, fully designed and responsive, ready to make your own.

items.title: 12 colour themes
items.description: Switch the whole site's palette live from the header. Light and dark mode included.

items.title: Blog with table of contents
items.description: MDX, RSS, tags, comments, related posts, and a scroll-spy table of contents. Write and publish.

items.title: Projects with galleries
items.description: A portfolio section with image galleries, video slides, tags, and its own table of contents.

items.title: Full i18n, opt-in
items.description: Blog, projects, navigation, forms, and 404: all localized per locale. Off by default, at zero cost when unused.

items.title: Site search
items.description: Fast static search (Pagefind) with a ⌘K modal: zero JavaScript until it's opened.

items.title: SEO toolkit
items.description: Metadata, sitemaps, structured data, and OG images, correct out of the box.

items.title: Forms & deploy
items.description: Spam-protected contact and newsletter forms, and one-switch deploys to Vercel, Netlify, or Cloudflare.

principles.heading: Built with intention
principles.lead: Every decision in Astro Rocket, from component structure to default config, is driven by the same three principles.

items.title: Performance First
items.description: Zero JavaScript by default. Every component is optimised for speed, Core Web Vitals, and lean output.

items.title: Developer Experience
items.description: TypeScript throughout, sensible defaults, and a component library you can drop straight into any page.

items.title: Modern from the Ground Up
items.description: Astro 7, Tailwind CSS 4, and a clean architecture that's easy to extend and maintain.

stack.title: The Stack
stack.description: The technologies powering Astro Rocket, chosen for performance, great developer experience, and long-term reliability.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.lead: Everything you need to know before getting started.

items.question: What is Astro?
items.answer: Astro is a modern web framework built for content-driven sites. It ships zero JavaScript by default — only sending what the page actually needs. The result is fast load times, excellent Core Web Vitals scores, and lean, maintainable code.

items.question: Why build with Astro?
items.answer: Astro is the right tool for content-heavy sites: minimal JavaScript, clean HTML, great SEO out of the box, and a developer experience that stays out of your way. It's lean, purposeful, and built to last.

items.question: What can I build with Astro Rocket?
items.answer: Portfolios, business sites, marketing pages, blogs, documentation sites — any content-driven project. Astro Rocket gives you the structure, components, and defaults to hit the ground running.

items.question: Is Astro Rocket listed on the official Astro themes directory?
items.answer: Yes. Astro Rocket is listed on the official Astro themes directory as a free, production-ready theme.

items.question: Will Astro Rocket keep up with new Astro releases?
items.answer: Yes. Astro Rocket is actively maintained and updated to track new Astro releases. Follow along on the blog or watch the GitHub repository for updates.

items.question: Is it free to use?
items.answer: Yes, completely free. Astro Rocket is MIT licensed — use it for personal and commercial projects, no attribution required.

items.question: How do I switch themes?
items.answer: Change a single line in your config. Astro Rocket ships with 12 hand-crafted colour themes — swap between them instantly without touching a line of CSS.

items.question: Does it support TypeScript?
items.answer: Yes, TypeScript is used throughout. All components, configs, and utilities are fully typed.

items.question: How do I add my own language for i18n?
items.answer: Astro Rocket's i18n is config-driven. Add your locale to the i18n config file, create a matching translation file, and the routing and UI adapt automatically.

items.question: Where do I report bugs or suggest features?
items.answer: Open an issue or start a discussion on the GitHub repository. Contributions and feedback are always welcome.

openSource.heading: Built in the open
openSource.description: Astro Rocket is free, open source, and MIT licensed. Browse the source, open issues, submit PRs, or just clone it and build something great.

cards.title: Made by Hans Martens Dev
cards.text: Astro Rocket was designed and built by Hans Martens Dev — a freelance Astro developer who uses it as the foundation for client projects.

cards.title: MIT License
cards.text: Free to use in personal and commercial projects. No attribution required, though a star on GitHub is always appreciated.

cards.title: Actively maintained
cards.text: The theme is kept up to date with new Astro releases and regularly improved based on community feedback.

cta.heading: Ready to build?
cta.description: Clone Astro Rocket, pick a theme, and launch your next project in minutes.

meta.title: Services — Web Design, Development & Optimisation
meta.description: Freelance web design, development, and optimisation: sleek, lightning-fast custom Astro websites. A free first talk, one clear proposal, one fixed price.

hero.description: Three services, one product: a sleek, lightning-fast custom Astro website you're proud to put your name on.

design.heading: Web design
paragraphs: Web design is how your website looks and feels: the layout, the colours, the images, and the way visitors find their way around.

I design every website around your business — your brand, your content, and the customers you want to reach — so it makes a strong first impression and guides people straight to what matters. Clean, modern, and made to work on every screen, from a desktop monitor to a phone.

included.text: shaped around your business, your brand, and the customers you want to reach.
a clean, modern look that shows people who you are the moment your page opens.
a layout that guides visitors straight to what matters to them.
looks and works beautifully on phone, tablet, and desktop.
your words and images given a layout that makes them easy to read and good to look at.

development.heading: Web development
paragraphs: Web development is the building of your website: turning the design into the code that runs in your visitor's browser.

I build with Astro, a modern framework trusted for some of the fastest websites online. That makes your site quick to load, safe, and easy to look after for years to come. And it's yours from day one, with the code, the domain, and the hosting all in your name.

included.text: built with Astro, the framework behind some of the fastest websites online.
one that stays safe and keeps working, year after year.
the code, the domain, and the hosting all in your name from day one.
your website kept updated and secure with the monthly care plan, while you run your business.
space to add new pages and features whenever your business needs them.

performance.heading: Web optimisation
paragraphs: Web optimisation is the work that makes your website perform: loading quickly, ranking well in search, and working for everyone.

I build speed, SEO, and accessibility in from the very first line, not as an afterthought. That means your website is easy for Google to find and understand, opens fast for every visitor, and can be used by everyone who lands on it.

included.lead: A website Google and AI can find
included.text: built so search engines and AI assistants can read, understand, and recommend your pages.
pages that stay quick, even on a phone or a slower connection.
accessible for every visitor, whatever their device or ability.
strong marks on Google's own speed and quality checks (Lighthouse).
speed, SEO, and accessibility built in from the very first line.

process.heading: How a project runs
process.lead: From your first message to a live website.

steps.title: First contact
steps.description: You send a message through the contact form. I reply within a working day, and we plan a free, informational talk about what you need. No obligations.

steps.title: Proposal
steps.description: After our talk you get one clear document: what I'll build, when it's ready, and the fixed price. You decide with everything on the table.

steps.title: Design & build
steps.description: I work in short cycles. You follow the progress on a staging link, and you see your website take shape.

steps.title: Launch & support
steps.description: Your website goes live on your own domain and hosting, in your name. Afterwards I stay reachable, and there's a monthly care plan if you want regular updates.

faq.heading: Questions and answers
faq.lead: The things clients ask before we start.

items.question: What does a website cost?
items.answer: Every project gets one fixed price, agreed before we start. No hourly billing, no surprises afterwards. The free talk — and the free check, if there's already a website — tells me what your project needs, and you get the price in one clear proposal.

items.question: How long does a project take?
items.answer: That depends on the size of the website. The proposal names the timeline together with the price, so you know both before we start.

items.question: What happens with my current website?
items.answer: It stays online until the new one is ready. Your content, your web address, and your Google rankings come along. I check your current website before our first talk, so you get clear answers from the start.

items.question: Do I need to arrange hosting or a domain?
items.answer: No. I set up the hosting and the domain for you, in your own name. If you already have a domain, we simply keep it.

items.question: Do we need to meet in person?
items.answer: It's not needed. Most projects run entirely by phone, video, and email. I work with clients worldwide, and time zones are rarely a problem.

items.question: Are you a company or agency?
items.answer: I'm a one-person business: a freelancer, not an agency. You work directly with the person doing the work, from the first talk to the finished website. No sales team, no account managers, no handoffs.

items.question: Can I change the website myself after launch?
items.answer: You can simply send me your changes, and the monthly care plan exists exactly for that. If you want to edit the website yourself, say so in the first talk and I set the site up for it.

items.question: Do you also build webshops?
items.answer: No. Big online shops are the one thing I don't build. Everything else that needs a custom Astro website, I build: tell me in the first talk what you have in mind, and I'll be honest about whether I'm the right builder for it.

items.question: Is the website really mine?
items.answer: Completely. The domain, the hosting, and the code are in your name from day one. If you ever want to move on, you take everything with you: you're never locked in.

items.question: What happens if something breaks after launch?
items.answer: Very little can break: the website has no plugins and no database to fail. And I stay reachable after launch; for regular updates and monitoring there is the monthly care plan.

cta.heading: Let's talk about what you need
cta.description: The first talk is free and informative, with no obligations: by phone, video, or email. You get honest answers, and after the talk one clear proposal with a timeline and a fixed price.
